message.content:
I need to understand how the existing unit movement animation works in LFP2D, specifically the Timeline-based movement in ALFPTacticsUnit. Look at:

1. Source/LFP2D/Unit/LFPTacticsUnit.h and .cpp - find the MoveToTile method, Timeline setup, and how it animates movement along a path (interpolating between tiles)
2. How the movement animation completes and triggers callbacks

Also check Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapNode.cpp for the visual state and highlighting implementation.

Report the key patterns: Timeline setup, interpolation approach, completion callbacks.

content.text: I'll search for the unit movement animation implementation and world map visual state. Let me gather the relevant files.

content.content:

content.text: Now let me look at the header file for LFPWorldMapNode to understand the full picture:

1→#pragma once
     2→
     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "GameFramework/Actor.h"
     5→#include "LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapData.h"
     6→#include "LFPWorldMapNode.generated.h"

     9→class UPaperSprite;
    10→class ULFPWorldNodeDataAsset;
    11→
    12→UCLASS()
    13→class LFP2D_API ALFPWorldMapNode : public AActor
    14→{
    15→	GENERATED_BODY()
    16→
    17→public:

    19→

    72→
    73→	// 设置 2D 位置

    76→
    77→	// ============== 视觉 ==============

    79→	// 设置节点视觉数据

    82→
    83→	// 根据状态更新精灵显示

    85→	void UpdateVisualState();
    86→
    87→	// 设置高亮
    88→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "World Node|Visuals")
    89→	void SetHighlighted(bool bHighlight);
    90→
    91→protected:
    92→	// 根组件
    93→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Components")
    94→	TObjectPtr<USceneComponent> RootSceneComponent;
    95→
    96→	// 节点精灵
    97→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Components")
    98→	TObjectPtr<UPaperSpriteComponent> NodeSpriteComponent;
    99→
